intro: Diphyes inaudita, also known as the "ghost orchid," is a rare and endangered epiphytic orchid species native to the tropical forests of Africa. This plant is reported to have potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various infections and conditions.
